expected_signals.summary: The release fixes interrupt propagation in ToolRetryMiddleware.
The release fixes a shell middleware issue involving shared process-group kill behavior.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: avoid shared process-group kill in shell middleware

expected_signals.summary: The release fixes fallback-retry handling around anthropic cache markers.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: sanitize anthropic cache markers on fallback retries

notes: Patch release notes only: version bump plus three substantive fixes; style and test-type changes are maintenance. No runnable verifier: this is a static labeling task over the provided text, so observable evidence is limited to the quoted source anchors.
